diagrams.title: Binary Tree Traversals Flowchart
diagrams.description: Decision diagram showing all four traversal types with their node visit order
elements: Start → Queue-based → Process Level by Level (Level-order)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the fundamental difference between depth-first (recursive) and breadth-first (iterative queue) approaches

diagrams.title: Expression Tree for (3+4)*5-2/1
diagrams.description: Complete binary tree with operators as internal nodes and operands as leaves
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrate how expression trees encode operator precedence and how different traversals yield prefix/infix/postfix notation

diagrams.title: Morris Traversal Threading Mechanism
diagrams.description: Temporary threaded links created during inorder Morris traversal
elements: Original null left → thread to inorder predecessor
Original null right → thread to inorder successor (in some variants)
Shows temporary edge from node to predecessor bypassing null
Demonstrates 'back edge' creation and removal process
diagrams.purpose: Explain O(1) space technique showing how tree structure is temporarily modified without using stack
